heading: Review of findings of fact and conclusions of law
label: 3979 Review of findings of fact and conclusions of law
text: The findings of fact and conclusions of law made by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs in administering this subchapter are subject to review on appeal to the Board of Veterans’ Appeals pursuant to chapter 71 of title 38 and to judicial review only as provided in chapter 72 of such title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 549 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
